who: accounting firms processing 10–20 credit card statements/month
offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 credit card statements/month, manual report generation causes delays in client billing. We automate expense report generation instead of manual compilation of expense reports from credit card statements.
problem: Manual expense report generation is time-consuming and prone to errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for accounting tools and solutions
try_it: Let users try manual entry of transactions and report generation
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
